  "findings": [
    "Rebar mat is resting directly on the dirt/subgrade due to missing chairs and supports."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install approved concrete dobies, chairs, or spacers to achieve the required concrete cover from the subgrade.",
    "Re-inspect the entire mat for proper clearance and tie security before pouring concrete."
  ],
  "rationale": "The rebar mat is resting directly on the dirt, which violates concrete cover requirements and will lead to rapid corrosion and structural failure if poured. The work cannot pass inspection in this state and must be failed until proper supports are installed.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 318 Section 20.6.1.3 (Concrete cover requirements for cast-against-earth)",
    "ACI 117 (Tolerances for reinforcement support)",
    "Approved placing drawings"
  ]
}
